title: pilosella leptophyton subsp. leptophyton
intro: Pilosella leptophyton subsp. leptophyton, also known as the Alpine mouse-ear or Alpine hawk's-beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Pilosella leptophyton subsp. leptophyton include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
